description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a metallic receiver and barrel assembly. The stock and foregrip are made from a medium-brown wood, providing a traditional and sturdy appearance. The receiver is rectangular and metallic, with a simple trigger guard and a straight magazine well, though no magazine is currently visible. The barrel is long and slender, extending from the receiver with a smooth, unadorned finish and no visible muzzle device. Iron sights are present, with a front post and a rear notch integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel. The overall silhouette and material choices evoke early to mid-20th-century submachine gun designs, suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, metallic receiver, and a long, smooth barrel with iron sights. The design is simple and robust, with no visible magazine or muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, foregrip, metallic receiver, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and iron sight alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, foregrip, and metallic receiver from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
